result.comments: Gap analysis reviewed. 17 gaps identified with 3 high-severity security issues. Proceeding with role-by-role implementation: Admin (5 gaps), Leader (8 gaps), User (4 gaps). Each role will have full test cycles including desktop and mobile views.
